title: Sweet Silky Syrian Chicken Grill
description: A sweet and comforting Syrian dish featuring chicken stock cube and grilled to perfection, this paleo-friendly recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, honey, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the chicken breast to the marinade and mix well to coat, then let it marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook on the grill for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the chicken is cooking, dissolve the chicken stock cubes in 1 cup of hot water to make the glaze.
After the chicken is cooked, brush the glaze all over the chicken to give it a sweet and silky texture.
Let the chicken rest for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme if desired.
